title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Execution Trace: Review Defense
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 review defense increment in an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend correctness, cost, alternatives, limits, and operational behavior to a technical review board.
Design timeout, partial-result, retry, and diagnostic behavior without corrupting claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
